caption: A woman with dark hair styled in a high bun and braided along the side of her head speaks into a professional black microphone. She wears a dark green t-shirt with a circular red and white graphic on the chest and black headphones. The setting is a studio with a white wall background. Behind her is a black backdrop featuring white and red text that includes "BOSS TALK 101" and "About It!". To her left, a framed digital screen displays a blue-tinted image of a person's hands. On the table in front of her, a small red and white logo reads "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence, the woman remains in the same position, shifting her facial expressions and slightly moving her head as she speaks, while the camera remains static.
